title: <div>I'm attaching the template for a power point presentation. I've also attach
content:
I'm attaching the template for a power point presentation. I've also attached social media data from Sprout Social we'll use to analyze and fill out the template. You are a digital marketing manager making a report for Miami Dade College after running ads during the I am MDC period of MDC Foundation fundraising events.

I want you to review the entire powerpoint presentation and then pull the data from the datasets, provide me with the copy to complete the slides.

Pre ad boost files:
Post Performance (Miami Dade College Foundation) July 12, 2023 - August 14, 2023.csv
Profile Performance (Miami Dade College Foundation) July 12, 2023 - August 14, 2023.csv

post ad boost files:
Post Performance (Miami Dade College Foundation) August 15, 2023 - September 17, 2023-2.csv
Profile Performance (Miami Dade College Foundation) August 15, 2023 - September 17, 2023.csv
